name: Install Packages
description: Install packages inside the LXC container. Supports both Alpine Linux (apk) and Debian/Ubuntu (apt) package managers. Includes automatic network readiness check with retry logic. Runs if either packages or addon_packages is set.

parameters.name: Packages
parameters.description: Space-separated list of packages to install. For Alpine Linux, use APK package names. For Debian/Ubuntu, use apt package names.

parameters.name: Addon Packages
parameters.description: Additional packages from addons (merged with base packages).

commands.description: Install packages using the appropriate package manager (apk for Alpine, apt for Debian/Ubuntu)
